message:
feat(core): add FromValue implementations for unsigned integer types

Extends the Value-to-Rust type conversion system to support unsigned
integers (u8, u16, u32, u64) which are common in MySQL schemas for
columns like TINYINT UNSIGNED, SMALLINT UNSIGNED, INT UNSIGNED, and
BIGINT UNSIGNED.

Implementation approach:
- First extracts as i64 (the internal representation for all integers)
- Then uses try_from for safe range checking
- Returns clear TypeError with "out of range" message if value exceeds
  the target type's bounds

This enables direct row.get::<u32>("count") style access without
requiring manual casts or intermediary conversions through signed types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
